title: Acme Corp Remote Work Policy
content: Employees at Acme Corp are allowed to work remotely up to 3 days a week. Core hours are between 10:00 AM and 3:00 PM EST, during which all employees must be available for meetings. Equipment such as laptops and monitors will be provided by the company. Employees must ensure they have a stable internet connection. In case of extended power or internet outages, employees should notify their manager immediately and may be required to work from the office or take paid time off. Home office stipends of $500 per year are available for purchasing ergonomic chairs or desks. Receipts must be submitted through the Expensify portal within 30 days of purchase.
